intro.title: Why Use Image to Video with Seedance 2.0?

content.title: Bring Static Images to Life with AI Animation
content.text: Image-to-video AI turns your photos and artwork into dynamic videos. Seedance 2.0 accepts up to 9 reference images and generates 15-second videos that preserve your visual style while adding motion, lighting, and camera movement. Ideal for product showcases, character animations, and creative storytelling. Unlike text-only generators, image-to-video gives you precise control over the starting visual—your reference defines the look, and the AI adds the motion. Perfect when you have a specific image, design, or product shot that needs to come alive.

content.title: Director-Level Control Over Motion and Style
content.text: Seedance 2.0 offers fine control over performance, lighting, shadow, and camera movement. Combine your reference images with text prompts to guide the animation—describe the motion you want, the camera angle, or the mood. The model excels at complex motions and interactions while following physical laws, even handling challenging scenarios like pair figure skating or dynamic product rotations. Whether you're animating a product for e-commerce or bringing concept art to life, the image-to-video generator respects your visual input while adding professional motion.

content.title: Free Online Image to Video for All Creators
content.text: Toolaze provides free image-to-video generation with Seedance 2.0. Upload up to 9 images and generate 1080p videos online—no sign-up required. Works for e-commerce sellers, digital artists, real estate professionals, and content creators. No software installation, no credit card, no usage caps to get started. Transform your static visuals into engaging video content in seconds. Download and use your AI-animated videos anywhere.

faq.a: Yes! Toolaze offers free image-to-video generation with Seedance 2.0. Upload up to 9 images and generate 1080p videos online. No sign-up required. There are no hidden fees or credit card requirements. Start transforming your images into videos immediately. The free tier is sufficient for most creators getting started.

faq.q: How many images can I use for image to video?
faq.a: Seedance 2.0 supports up to 9 reference images per generation. You can also add up to 3 video clips and 3 audio clips for multimodal control. Use multiple images to define different aspects—one for the character, one for the background, one for the style. The more references you provide, the more precise the output.

Seedance 2.0 accepts common image formats including JPG, PNG, and WebP. Upload your reference images directly to the online interface. Ensure images are clear and well-lit for best results. Very low-resolution or heavily compressed images may affect output quality.

faq.q: Can I add text to guide the video?
faq.a: Yes. Combine your reference images with natural language prompts. Describe the motion, style, and scene to guide Seedance 2.0's generation. For example: 'The product rotates slowly, cinematic lighting, soft shadows.' The text helps the AI understand how you want your static image to animate.

faq.q: Does image to video preserve my art style?
faq.a: Yes. Seedance 2.0 is designed to respect reference images. Your visual style, colors, and composition guide the output while the model adds motion and cinematic elements. For consistent character or brand visuals, use multiple reference images. The image-to-video AI excels at maintaining visual coherence.

faq.q: What's the difference between image to video and text to video?
faq.a: Image-to-video uses your images as the primary visual reference—the AI animates what you show. Text-to-video generates from description alone. Seedance 2.0 supports both: use image-to-video when you have a specific visual to animate, or combine both (image + text) for maximum control. Many creators use image-to-video for product shots and text-to-video for conceptual scenes.

faq.q: Can I animate a single product photo for e-commerce?
faq.a: Yes. Upload your product photo and add a text prompt like 'product rotates 360 degrees, studio lighting.' Seedance 2.0 will animate your static product shot into a dynamic video. Perfect for Amazon listings, Shopify product pages, and social media ads. One photo can become multiple video variations with different prompts.
